spec.precondition: requires valid(buf) && valid(buf->chunks) && forall i in [0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS): (buf->chunks[i] == NULL || valid(buf->chunks[i])) && (buf->chunks[i] != NULL implies ggml_backend_buffer_get_size(buf->chunks[i]) >= 0 && ggml_backend_buffer_get_size(buf->chunks[i]) <= SIZE_MAX) && (no integer overflow when summing all chunk sizes)
spec.postcondition: ensures result >= 0 && result == sum of ggml_backend_buffer_get_size(buf->chunks[i]) for all i where buf->chunks[i] != NULL && result <= SIZE_MAX && (no overflow occurred in computing result)
